mapper.sql: id, scene_id, module_key, position_key, config, is_default, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_scene_deployment WHERE scene_id = #{sceneId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC
SELECT FROM ai_scene_deployment WHERE module_key = #{moduleKey} AND position_key = #{positionKey} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_scene_deployment WHERE scene_id = #{sceneId} AND module_key = #{moduleKey} AND position_key = #{positionKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_scene_deployment (scene_id, module_key, position_key, config, is_default, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{sceneId}, #{moduleKey}, #{positionKey}, #{config, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isDefault, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sortOrder, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status, jdbcType=INTEGER}, NOW(), NOW())
